description.p: Time Warp Studio is an educational desktop programming environment that provides a unified IDE for learning 24 programming languages with integrated turtle graphics.

ul.li: C, Pascal, Prolog, Forth, Lua, Brainfuck
JavaScript, HyperTalk, Erlang, LISP/Scheme, COBOL, Tcl
PostScript, Ruby, Python, Haskell, 6502 Assembly, Perl, REXX, Smalltalk, APL

description.p: Features syntax highlighting, turtle graphics, a step-through debugger, 28 color themes, and 110+ example programs.

screenshot.caption: Main IDE with syntax highlighting and turtle canvas

description.p: v13.0.0 — Added REXX, Smalltalk, and APL language executors plus continued graphics, audio, and IDE improvements.
